title: Ontario farmers embrace extreme heat after weeks of storms, hail damage crops
description: Farmers in southwestern Ontario say that weeks of extreme weather events, including torrential rain and hail, has made growing crops a challenge. Some say they're embracing a week of hot temperatures, which can help crops get healthy.
content:
Some southwestern Ontario farmers are celebrating as intense heat blankets the region, calling it a welcome change after an unpredictable start to the growing season. 
Last Thursday, a severe thunde… [+3781 chars]
de: Landwirte in Ontario freuen sich über extreme Hitze, nachdem wochenlange Stürme und Hagel die Ernte beschädigt haben. Landwirte im Südwesten Ontarios sagen, dass wochenlange extreme Wetterereignisse, darunter sintflutartige Regenfälle und Hagel, den Pflanzenanbau zu einer Herausforderung gemacht haben. Einige sagen, dass sie sich auf eine Woche mit heißen Temperaturen freuen, was dazu beitragen kann, dass die Pflanzen gesund werden.
en: Ontario farmers embrace extreme heat after weeks of storms, hail damage crops. Farmers in southwestern Ontario say that weeks of extreme weather events, including torrential rain and hail, has made growing crops a challenge. Some say they're embracing a week of hot temperatures, which can help crops get healthy.
la: Ontario agricolae calorem maximum post septimanas tempestatum amplectuntur, grando fruges laedunt. Agricolae in Ontario meridiano dicunt septimanas extremarum rerum tempestatum, inclusos imbres torrentes et grandines, provocationem ad fruges crescere. Quidam dicunt se septem temperaturas calidas amplecti, quae adiuvant fruges sanos fieri.
